headline: APEC Conference
description: Our group participated in APEC 2026, and Prof. Zhang served as a session chair during the conference. Her student Xiangyu presented the work Self-Adjusting LFER-Based Dynamic Gate Driving Technique for Fast-Switching GaN HEMTs in 48-V Applications.

photos.caption: Ge Yuchu presenting poster at APEC 2026

headline: Rising Stars 2025, Taiwan
description: Prof. Zhang was invited to serve as a mentor for the 4th Taiwan Tech Young Entrepreneurs’ Rising Star Competition 2025.

photos.caption: Group photo at Rising Star Competition 2025

headline: ISPSD/ICD
description: Prof. Zhang served as a session chair at ISPSD/ICD 2025.

headline: ISPSD/ICD
description: Prof. Zhang served as a session chair at ISPSD 2024.

headline: During Her Time at ADI
description: Before joining academia, Prof. Weijia Zhang worked at Analog Devices (ADI). Her industry experience continues to inspire our group’s research with strong practical relevance.
